isi.lyrics:
Lyric gyun - drivemecrazy

Romanization

Go ahead and take the wheels before I turn insane, yeah
It’s clear that you drive me crazy
Been trying to straighten out, trying to make things right since you left
I guess you were never my lady

Count up all my problems
Pile up into mountains
Only you can solve 'em
neodo munjeneun mana
It’s ironic, girl

Now we on the verge of phase 2
I’d hate to just play you
The choice is yours
Huh, 2, 3, 4

I’m with the dogs, I’m ’bout to party
A room full of girls, they getting naughty
muneul bakchago baro nawatji
daechung bwado sujun ppeonhani

I know you’ve been thinking ’bout me
Talking shit to your friends ’bout me
Hold your horses, I’m the matador
I’ll be at your door

Go ahead and take the wheels before I turn insane, yeah
It’s clear that you drive me crazy
Been trying to straighten out, trying to make things right since you left
I guess you were never my lady

Go ahead and take the wheels before I turn insane, yeah
It’s clear that you drive me crazy
Been trying to straighten out, trying to make things right since you left
I guess you were never my lady

Hangeul

Go ahead and take the wheels before I turn insane, yeah
It’s clear that you drive me crazy
Been trying to straighten out, trying to make things right since you left
I guess you were never my lady

Count up all my problems
Pile up into mountains
Only you can solve 'em
너도 문제는 많아
It’s ironic, girl

Now we on the verge of phase 2
I’d hate to just play you
The choice is yours
Huh, 2, 3, 4

I’m with the dogs, I’m ’bout to party
A room full of girls, they getting naughty
문을 박차고 바로 나왔지
대충 봐도 수준 뻔하니

I know you’ve been thinking ’bout me
Talking shit to your friends ’bout me
Hold your horses, I’m the matador
I’ll be at your door

Go ahead and take the wheels before I turn insane, yeah
It’s clear that you drive me crazy
Been trying to straighten out, trying to make things right since you left
I guess you were never my lady

Go ahead and take the wheels before I turn insane, yeah
It’s clear that you drive me crazy
Been trying to straighten out, trying to make things right since you left
I guess you were never my lady
